name: Monarch
description:
Monarch functions as a +1 striking returning starknife that can't have additional property runes, as it's a specific item. Monarch deals an additional 1d6 untyped damage to creatures with the aberration trait, provided the creature isn't disguised as another creature.

Activate 10 minutes (envision, Interact)

Frequency once per day

Requirements Monarch must possess a major gift

Effect Monarch casts (heightened to 4th rank) to your specifications.
